respop2020_tidy

pacman::p_load(tidyverse)
pop_raw <- read_csv("data/respop2020_raw.csv")
Rows: 388 Columns: 61

$ Males_Total       <chr> "1977560", "77570", "2260", "13480", "12860", "10660…
$ Males_0_4         <chr> "93390", "2710", "90", "570", "450", "310", "110", "…
$ Males_5_9         <chr> "101730", "3020", "130", "540", "450", "340", "130",…
$ Males_10_14       <chr> "104970", "3590", "120", "570", "550", "460", "180",…
$ Males_15_19       <chr> "109870", "3870", "160", "600", "590", "480", "220",…
$ Males_20_24       <chr> "124620", "4410", "130", "710", "700", "600", "240",…
$ Males_25_29       <chr> "142380", "5100", "140", "850", "790", "670", "240",…
$ Males_30_34       <chr> "143020", "5030", "130", "920", "920", "660", "170",…
$ Males_35_39       <chr> "141360", "4890", "140", "1000", "830", "660", "130"…
$ Males_40_44       <chr> "142800", "5270", "180", "980", "840", "770", "170",…
$ Males_45_49       <chr> "151690", "5910", "230", "1060", "880", "850", "260"…
$ Males_50_54       <chr> "145380", "5720", "190", "1000", "910", "830", "270"…
$ Males_55_59       <chr> "152960", "6330", "160", "1060", "1050", "930", "260…
$ Males_60_64       <chr> "141470", "6090", "140", "960", "1040", "830", "250"…
$ Males_65_69       <chr> "112610", "5480", "110", "960", "970", "790", "190",…
$ Males_70_74       <chr> "80820", "4570", "100", "820", "820", "640", "170", …
$ Males_75_79       <chr> "40770", "2570", "60", "420", "520", "370", "100", "…
$ Males_80_84       <chr> "27890", "1800", "40", "290", "340", "280", "70", "1…
$ Males_85_89       <chr> "13520", "890", "10", "130", "180", "150", "40", "90…
$ Males_90andOver   <chr> "6310", "320", "10", "50", "60", "50", "30", "30", "…
$ Females_Total     <chr> "2066650", "84700", "2550", "14600", "13640", "11970…
$ Females_0_4       <chr> "89690", "2570", "80", "490", "420", "350", "100", "…
$ Females_5_9       <chr> "97010", "3080", "110", "510", "400", "470", "190", …
$ Females_10_14     <chr> "101430", "3440", "160", "470", "470", "490", "220",…
$ Females_15_19     <chr> "105370", "3730", "160", "560", "470", "530", "240",…
$ Females_20_24     <chr> "119920", "4280", "140", "620", "610", "570", "260",…
$ Females_25_29     <chr> "144620", "5220", "140", "860", "820", "740", "260",…
$ Females_30_34     <chr> "154780", "5460", "170", "1080", "980", "740", "190"…
$ Females_35_39     <chr> "158160", "5530", "190", "1140", "910", "780", "180"…
$ Females_40_44     <chr> "156490", "6070", "230", "1090", "960", "860", "210"…
$ Females_45_49     <chr> "160050", "6500", "250", "1140", "940", "940", "290"…
$ Females_50_54     <chr> "150690", "6140", "180", "1050", "990", "890", "270"…
$ Females_55_59     <chr> "152870", "6450", "150", "1060", "1040", "870", "300…
$ Females_60_64     <chr> "143160", "6650", "160", "1170", "1110", "920", "220…
$ Females_65_69     <chr> "116790", "6480", "140", "1210", "1130", "910", "220…
$ Females_70_74     <chr> "89190", "5350", "130", "920", "990", "790", "200", …
$ Females_75_79     <chr> "50220", "3200", "80", "540", "610", "470", "130", "…
$ Females_80_84     <chr> "38630", "2350", "60", "360", "440", "350", "80", "2…
$ Females_85_89     <chr> "23060", "1390", "30", "210", "250", "190", "60", "1…
$ Females_90andOver <chr> "14560", "810", "20", "130", "140", "110", "40", "10…
cat("Total rows:", nrow(pop_raw), "\n")
Total rows: 388 
cat("Country-level Total rows:", sum(pop_raw$Number == "Total"), "\n")
Country-level Total rows: 1 
cat("Planning Area subtotals (XXX - Total):",
    sum(str_detect(pop_raw$Number, " - Total$")), "\n")
Planning Area subtotals (XXX - Total): 54 
cat("Subzone-level rows:",
    sum(pop_raw$Number != "Total" &
        !str_detect(pop_raw$Number, " - Total$")), "\n")
Subzone-level rows: 333 
agpop_mutated <- pop_raw %>%
  
  # (a) 重命名第一列
  rename(SZ = Number) %>%
  
  # (b) 去掉全国 Total 行
  filter(SZ != "Total") %>%
  
  # (c) 去掉规划区汇总行 (XXX - Total)
  filter(!str_detect(SZ, " - Total$")) %>%
  
  # (d) 只留 Total_* 年龄组列
  select(SZ, starts_with("Total_"), -Total_Total) %>%
  
  # (e) 字符串转 numeric (`-` 会变成 NA)
  mutate(across(-SZ, ~ as.numeric(.x))) %>%
  
  # (f) 派生 YOUNG / ACTIVE / OLD / TOTAL
  mutate(
    YOUNG  = rowSums(across(c(Total_0_4, Total_5_9, Total_10_14,
                              Total_15_19, Total_20_24)),
                     na.rm = TRUE),
    ACTIVE = rowSums(across(c(Total_25_29, Total_30_34, Total_35_39, Total_40_44,
                              Total_45_49, Total_50_54, Total_55_59, Total_60_64)),
                     na.rm = TRUE),
    OLD    = rowSums(across(c(Total_65_69, Total_70_74, Total_75_79,
                              Total_80_84, Total_85_89, Total_90andOver)),
                     na.rm = TRUE),
    TOTAL  = YOUNG + ACTIVE + OLD
  ) %>%
  
  # 过滤无人 subzone
  filter(TOTAL > 0) %>%
  
  # 只保留最终需要的 5 列
  select(SZ, YOUNG, ACTIVE, OLD, TOTAL)
Warning: There were 19 warnings in `mutate()`.
The first warning was:
ℹ In argument: `across(-SZ, ~as.numeric(.x))`.
Caused by warning:
! NAs introduced by coercion
ℹ Run `dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()` to see the 18 remaining warnings.
glimpse(agpop_mutated)
Rows: 235
Columns: 5
$ SZ     <chr> "Ang Mo Kio Town Centre", "Cheng San", "Chong Boon", "Kebun Bah…
$ YOUNG  <dbl> 1280, 5630, 5080, 4600, 1880, 3320, 1950, 4160, 1100, 5700, 212…
$ ACTIVE <dbl> 2760, 16420, 14980, 12950, 3650, 9070, 4500, 11930, 2370, 13760…
$ OLD    <dbl> 780, 6030, 6440, 5080, 1320, 3570, 1510, 5060, 720, 4700, 940, …
$ TOTAL  <dbl> 4820, 28080, 26500, 22630, 6850, 15960, 7960, 21150, 4190, 2416…

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
write_csv(agpop_mutated, "data/respop2020_tidy.csv")

:::
